people.name: Mayor Lewis
people.conversation: Happy Birthday Lindsay! Glad to have you in our small town. You have been such a bright spot for us over these many years.

people.name: Aaron
people.conversation: Happy Birthday Lindsay! I love you very much and am excited to celebrate your birthday with you in the Stardrop Saloon! How cool is this?

people.name: Emily
people.conversation: Oh! It's your birthday! So that's why the saloon is extra crowded tonight. How exciting! Talk to Gus, and see if he'll get you a birthday cider.

people.name: Gus
people.conversation: Well there's the birthday girl! Here is a cider on the house. Tell Mayor Lewis thanks for hosting your party here this year.

people.name: Elliot
people.conversation: Happy Birthday! I have some cool shells from the beach that I thought you'd like, since you enjoy combing the beach.

people.name: Sebastian
people.conversation: Happy Birthday Lindsay! Ssshhh I snuck the mayor's shorts out of Marnie's house for your present!

people.name: Marnie
people.conversation: Happy Birthday! I heard a rustling sound earlier that sounded like it came from my room...do you know anything about that?

people.name: Willy
people.conversation: Ahoy lass, it's yer birthday again. May we have another grand year of fishing together. Just don't feed any to your husband.

people.name: Shane
people.conversation: I'm not much of a talker usually, but happy birthday. Cheers to another great year. Thanks for always being there for me.

people.name: Pam
people.conversation: Well I'll be darned, it's your birthday! Happy birthday kid.

people.name: Demetrius
people.conversation: Happy Birthday Lindsay. Thanks for being a great friend to Maru and Sebastian, and for your help in the cave on your farm.

people.name: Robin
people.conversation: Happy Birthday Lindsay! Your house looks really great these days - it's so big and spacious!

people.name: Pierre
people.conversation: Happy Birthday to my most loyal customer! Maybe I'll slip you a 10% discount on your next purchase.
